tools.name: get_orderbook

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get the Level 2 orderbook for a Hyperliquid perpetual market. Returns bids/asks with cumulative depth, liquidity metrics, and volume context for understanding market absorption capacity.

nSigFigs.description: Aggregate price levels to N significant figures (2-5). Lower = wider view.

liquidityContext.description: Context comparing orderbook to daily volume

tools.name: calculate_price_impact

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Calculate the price impact of selling or buying a specific amount. Simulates execution through the orderbook, estimates TWAP duration for minimal impact, and provides absorption analysis. CRITICAL for analyzing large order flows.

side.description: sell hits bids, buy lifts asks

confidence.description: Confidence in estimate (limited by visible book depth)

tools.name: get_market_info

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get comprehensive market information: price, volume, open interest, funding rate, max leverage, and market health metrics.

tools.name: list_markets

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: List all available perpetual markets on Hyperliquid with prices and basic info.

tools.name: get_funding_analysis

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Get comprehensive funding rate analysis including current rates, predicted rates across venues (Binance, Bybit, Hyperliquid), and arbitrage opportunities.

tools.name: get_staking_summary

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get Hyperliquid staking statistics and mechanics. Essential for understanding HYPE token dynamics.

tools.name: get_user_delegations

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get staking delegations for a specific wallet address.

tools.name: get_open_interest_analysis

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Analyze open interest for a coin: current OI, OI changes, long/short ratio estimation, and OI caps. Identifies liquidation cascade risk.

tools.name: get_candles

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get historical OHLCV candle data for technical analysis.

tools.name: get_recent_trades

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get recent trades with whale detection. Returns the last ~100 trades chronologically and flags any exceeding the whale threshold. NOTE: True whale trades ($100k+) are rare events and may not appear in this snapshot. Use analyze_whale_wallet with known addresses for reliable whale tracking.

whaleThresholdUsd.description: USD threshold for whale trades (default: $100,000). Lower for altcoins, higher for BTC.

whaleTrades.description: Trades exceeding whale threshold (may be empty)

tools.name: analyze_large_order

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: COMPREHENSIVE analysis for large order scenarios (like team unlocks, whale sells). Combines orderbook depth, volume context, funding sentiment, and OI analysis. Provides execution recommendations.

confidence.description: Confidence in analysis (based on data quality)

tools.name: get_markets_at_oi_cap

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get list of perpetual markets currently at their open interest caps.

tools.name: get_hlp_vault_stats

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get HLP (Hyperliquidity Provider) vault statistics including APR, TVL, and performance.

tools.name: get_funding_history

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get historical funding rates for a coin over a time period.

days.description: Number of days of history (default: 30, max: 90)

tools.name: get_exchange_stats

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get aggregated exchange-wide statistics: total 24h volume, total OI, and market counts.

tools.name: get_volume_history

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Analyze historical volume trends for a coin. Critical for understanding liquidity trends.

coin.description: Coin symbol (e.g., "HYPE"). If omitted, analyzes major markets.

days.description: Number of days of history (default: 30, max: 90)

tools.name: get_spot_meta

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get spot market metadata including all tokens and trading pairs available on Hyperliquid spot.

tokens.description: List of all spot tokens with decimals and metadata

universe.description: List of all spot trading pairs

assetContexts.description: Current prices and volumes for spot pairs

tools.name: get_spot_balances

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get spot token balances for any wallet address with CURRENT market values and unrealized P&L. Unlike perps, spot holdings are simply owned tokens (no margin/leverage).

balances.description: Token balances with current prices and P&L

tools.name: get_user_state

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get perpetual positions and margin state for any wallet address. Includes positions, margin usage, and withdrawable balance.

assetPositions.description: All open perp positions with P&L

tools.name: get_open_orders

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get all open orders for a wallet address. Includes limit orders, trigger orders, and TP/SL orders.

orders.description: All open orders with prices, sizes, and types

tools.name: get_order_status

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get the status of a specific order by order ID. Shows if filled, canceled, or open.

tools.name: get_user_fills

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get trade fill history for a wallet. Returns up to 2000 most recent fills with P&L and fees.

fills.description: Trade fills with price, size, P&L, and fees

tools.name: get_user_fees

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get fee schedule and VIP tier info for a wallet. Includes maker/taker rates, discounts, and staking benefits.

tools.name: get_referral_state

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get referral program state for a wallet including referred volume, rewards, and builder fees.

tools.name: get_user_portfolio

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get historical portfolio data including account value and P&L history over different timeframes.

portfolio.description: Portfolio data by timeframe (day, week, month, allTime)

tools.name: get_user_vault_equities

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get all vault positions for a wallet including equity in each vault.

vaultEquities.description: List of vault positions with equity

tools.name: get_sub_accounts

rateLimit.notes: Raw data endpoint suitable for iterative Execute workflows.

tools.description: Get all sub-accounts for a master wallet including their positions and balances.

tools.name: analyze_trader_performance

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Comprehensive trading performance analysis for any wallet. Combines fills, fees, and portfolio data to calculate win rate, P&L, fee efficiency, and trading patterns. Identifies optimization opportunities.

days.description: Days of history to analyze (default: 30, max: 90)

tools.name: analyze_spot_markets

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Comprehensive spot market analysis. Identifies high-volume pairs, liquidity depth, price divergences between spot and perp, and arbitrage opportunities.

spotPerpDivergences.description: Pairs with significant spot-perp price differences

tools.name: analyze_whale_wallet

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Deep analysis of any wallet's positions, orders, and trading activity. Identifies position sizing, leverage usage, directional bias, and recent activity patterns. Essential for tracking notable traders.

positions.description: All positions with size, leverage, and P&L

tools.name: analyze_my_positions

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Analyze your DIRECT Hyperliquid perpetual positions (main trading account) with risk assessment, P&L breakdown, liquidation warnings, and personalized recommendations. Does NOT include vault positions - use analyze_vault_exposure for that. Requires portfolio context.

portfolio.description: Your Hyperliquid portfolio context (injected by the Context app)

focus_coin.description: Optional: specific coin to focus analysis on (e.g., 'ETH')

vaultExposureNote.description: Note if user has vault equity that should be analyzed separately

tools.name: analyze_vault_exposure

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: Analyze your exposure through Hyperliquid vaults (like HLP). Shows your equity in each vault, the vault's positions, and calculates your 'shadow positions' (proportional share of vault positions). Essential for understanding true market exposure when you're invested in vaults.

address.description: Wallet address (0x...). If not provided, requires portfolio context.

portfolio.description: Optional: Your Hyperliquid portfolio context (injected by the Context app) - only walletAddress is used

shadowPositions.description: User's proportional share of vault positions

totalVaultEquity.description: Total USD value across all vaults

aggregatedExposure.description: Combined exposure across all vaults by coin

tools.name: analyze_full_portfolio

rateLimit.notes: Composite analysis tool. Prefer narrowing scope first (coin/address filters) for faster responses.

tools.description: 🧠 INTELLIGENCE: COMPREHENSIVE portfolio analysis combining ALL exposure sources: (1) Direct trading positions (main account), (2) Vault exposure (HLP, user vaults), (3) Sub-accounts. Provides true total market exposure with clear source labeling. Use this to answer 'What is my REAL exposure?'

address.description: Wallet address (0x...). If not provided, requires portfolio context.

portfolio.description: Optional: Your Hyperliquid portfolio context (injected by the Context app)

aggregatedExposure.description: Total exposure by coin across ALL sources

tools.name: place_order

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Place a perpetual order on Hyperliquid. Returns a signature request that must be approved by the user. Supports limit, market, stop-loss, and take-profit orders. The signature is used to authorize the order without exposing the user's private key. To CLOSE a position: set closeEntirePosition=true and the size will be auto-calculated from the user's current position.

size.description: Order size in base units (e.g., 0.1 ETH). NOT required if closeEntirePosition=true.

isBuy.description: true for long/buy, false for short/sell

price.description: Limit price. For market orders, this is auto-calculated with slippage.

postOnly.description: If true, order will only be placed if it would be a maker order (default: false)

portfolio.description: Optional: Your Hyperliquid portfolio context (injected by the Context app)

reduceOnly.description: If true, order can only reduce position size (default: false, auto-set true for SL/TP)

triggerPrice.description: Trigger price for stop-loss or take-profit orders (required for those types)

closeEntirePosition.description: If true, automatically use the FULL position size from portfolio context. Sets reduceOnly=true. Use this for closing positions instead of guessing the size.

tools.name: cancel_orders

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Cancel one or more open perpetual orders by order ID (oid) for a coin. Returns a signature request for user approval.

orderIds.description: Array of Hyperliquid order IDs (oid) to cancel

tools.name: cancel_orders_by_cloid

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Cancel one or more open perpetual orders by client order ID (cloid). Returns a signature request for user approval.

cloids.description: Array of client order IDs (cloid) to cancel

tools.name: schedule_cancel

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Set or clear Hyperliquid dead-man's switch (scheduleCancel). Returns a signature request for user approval.

disable.description: If true, clear existing dead-man's switch instead of setting a new one.

secondsFromNow.description: When to auto-cancel all open orders, in seconds from now (default: 300). Ignored if disable=true.

tools.name: modify_order

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Modify an existing perpetual order by oid. Returns a signature request for user approval.

size.description: New order size in base units

isBuy.description: true for buy/long, false for sell/short

price.description: New limit price. Required for limit orders, optional for market order.

postOnly.description: If true on limit orders, use maker-only placement

reduceOnly.description: If true, only reduces position size

tools.name: batch_modify_orders

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Modify multiple existing perpetual orders in one action. Returns a signature request for user approval.

modifications.description: Array of order modifications (max 20). Each entry must include oid, isBuy, and size.

tools.name: update_leverage

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Update leverage settings for a perpetual market. Returns a signature request for user approval.

marginMode.description: Use cross or isolated margin mode (default: cross)

tools.name: update_isolated_margin

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Add or remove isolated margin for a perpetual market. Returns a signature request for user approval.

isBuy.description: Direction selector required by endpoint (currently has no effect; default true).

usdDelta.description: USD amount to add (positive) or remove (negative) from isolated margin.

tools.name: place_twap_order

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Place a TWAP order on Hyperliquid. Returns a signature request for user approval.

size.description: Total order size in base units

isBuy.description: true for buy/long, false for sell/short

randomize.description: If true, randomize TWAP slice timing

reduceOnly.description: If true, only reduce existing positions

tools.name: cancel_twap_order

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Cancel an active TWAP order by TWAP ID. Returns a signature request for user approval.

tools.name: stake_hype

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Stake HYPE into Hyperliquid staking (cDeposit). Returns a signature request for user approval.

signatureChainId.description: Hex chain id used for signing (default: "0xa4b1")

tools.name: unstake_hype

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Unstake HYPE from Hyperliquid staking (cWithdraw). Returns a signature request for user approval.

signatureChainId.description: Hex chain id used for signing (default: "0xa4b1")

tools.name: delegate_stake

rateLimit.notes: Write action. Use sparingly and only after explicit user intent.

tools.description: 🔐 WRITE ACTION: Delegate or undelegate staked HYPE to a validator (tokenDelegate). Returns a signature request for user approval.

isUndelegate.description: Set true to undelegate, false to delegate

signatureChainId.description: Hex chain id used for signing (default: "0xa4b1")

tools.name: verify_signature_security

rateLimit.notes: Internal handshake callback. Not intended for direct user invocation.

tools.description: 🔒 Security verification tool for testing signature request handling. Returns different EIP-712 signature patterns to verify client detection works. Use with scenario: 'standard_order', 'withdrawal_request', or 'transfer_request'.

tools.name: submit_signed_action

rateLimit.notes: Internal handshake callback. Not intended for direct user invocation.

tools.description: 🔐 INTERNAL: Submit a signed action to Hyperliquid. This tool is called automatically after the user signs a handshake request. It takes the signature and action payload from the handshake flow and submits to Hyperliquid.

nonce.description: Action nonce in milliseconds. If omitted, server attempts to recover it from handshake metadata.

action.description: The preformatted Hyperliquid exchange action object (order/cancel/modify/TWAP/leverage/margin/staking/etc).

signature.description: The EIP-712 signature from the user's wallet

vaultAddress.description: Optional vault address if trading for a vault
